case_title: EDMOND DIONES VS. RFS INVESTMENT L.L.C., A LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIONES, EDMOND AS TO DEFENDANT RFS INVESTMENT L.L.C., A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA RFS DELIVERY AND LOGISTICS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIONES, EDMOND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RFS INVESTMENT L.L.C., A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA RFS DELIVERY AND LOGISTICS $4,540.41 PRINCIPAL, $22.60 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,788.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
